members.label: wall feature
members.description: second-floor balcony railing / open loft balustrade
members.long_form_open_description: White wooden balustrade forming the second-floor balcony/loft overlook. Runs horizontally across the mid-upper image, separating the two-story living area from the upper rooms. Dark wooden top rail contrasts with white spindles.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits above the doorway opening into the kitchen; aligned above the kitchen island
